title: Data lineage issue in looped execution
symptom: When referencing data from a previous node in a looped execution, some items resolve to undefined. This occurs due to item linking issues.
applies_when: The upstream node changes item count
not_this_if: The workflow does not involve item linking or looping
root_cause: In n8n, each item maintains its own data lineage. If an upstream node modifies the item count through operations like Split In Batches or Merge, the linkage to the corresponding items can break, leading to undefined values.
fix_steps: Use $items('Node Name', 0, 0) to access a specific item directly.
Alternatively, restructure the workflow to ensure item pairing is maintained.
agent_instruction: Access specific items directly using $items or restructure the workflow to maintain item pairing.
